title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Narayana Health Digital Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Narayana Health Digital Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Narayana Health Digital Ventures Solutions family as a Backend Developer in Kochi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Narayana Health Digital Ventures Solutions:
Narayana Health Digital Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Health Digital Ventures Solutions!
